transcript.final_response:
Done.

I created the archive and extracted it:

- Archive created: **`/tmp/project.tar.gz`**
- Backup directory created: **`/backup`**
- Archive extracted into: **`/backup`** (resulting in **`/backup/project`**)

Verification shows files exist in `/backup/project`, including:

- `/backup/project/README.md`
- `/backup/project/src/main.sh`

And the archive file is present:

- `/tmp/project.tar.gz` (229 bytes)
tool_calls:
set -euo pipefail
# Create compressed archive of /project
tar -czf /tmp/project.tar.gz -C / project

# Create backup directory and extract archive there
mkdir -p /backup
tar -xzf /tmp/project.tar.gz -C /backup

# Verify extracted files
if [ -d /backup/project ]; then
  echo "Extraction successful: /backup/project exists"
  echo "Contents (up to 50 entries):"
  find /backup/project -maxdepth 3 | head -n 50
else
  echo "Extraction failed: /backup/project does not exist" >&2
  exit 1
fi

# Confirm archive exists
ls -l /tmp/project.tar.gz
